productDisplayName: Carrera Men Steel dial Silver Watches
description: carrera /has been in the watch industry for more than five decades now and has proven that it is the master of creating high quality timepieces. The new ranges of carrera watches are a fresh take on their classic drivers& rsquo and racers& rsquo watch models and are perfect for urban wear.   Case diameter: 39 mm Case thickness: 9 mm Dial shape: Rectangle   Stainless steel case with stainless steel strap Butterfly clasp with brand inscription Fixed stainless steel bezel for added durability and style Black busy dial with metallic numbers Chronograph for easy reading of time Metallic crown to adjust time/date/day Fluorescence for easy visibility in low light conditions Water resistant at 100 meters, making it suitable for use when swimming
